Usage: gs branch (b) comment (cmt) edit <id> [flags]

Edit a comment

Edits the body of a comment.

For staged comments (sc-N prefix), the comment is updated in the local staging
area.

For forge comments, the comment is updated on the remote forge.

If no message is given with -m, an editor is opened with the current comment
body pre-filled.

Arguments:
  <id>    Comment ID to edit. Use 'sc-N' for staged comments or a forge comment
          ID.

Flags:
  -m, --message=MSG      New comment body. Opens editor if not provided.
  -b, --branch=BRANCH    Branch whose comments to edit. Defaults to current
                         branch.

Global Flags:
  -h, --help           Show help for the command
      --version        Print version information and quit
  -v, --verbose        Enable verbose output ($GIT_SPICE_VERBOSE)
  -C, --dir=DIR        Change to DIR before doing anything
      --[no-]prompt    Whether to prompt for missing information
